_doc: Round-7 F68 manifest. Each check pins a METRICS.jsonl field to a list of `yellow` values (recoverable-but-not-green states). When the last `max_unchanged_iters+1` rows all carry the same field value AND that value is in `yellow_values`, Validate-LongYellowState.ps1 emits a `long-yellow-state-stuck` drift so the operator dashboard can escalate. Default contract ships with an empty `checks` array — a project's yellow vocabulary is project-specific (a Node service might track `service_health: degraded`; a Go daemon might track `dependency_status: outdated`; a web app `bundle_status: stale_in_cache`; a game engine `asset_status: ok_with_historical_drift`). Add an entry per (field, yellow-values) pair you want to age out.

_example_entry.comment: Uncomment / adapt and add to checks below. Field name is matched literally against METRICS.jsonl row keys; values are matched as strings.
_example_entry.detail: Repo identity has been yellow for 5+ consecutive iters; investigate whether the historical drift can now be reconciled or escalate.
